name: Undertale RPG
description:
Undertale Roleplay botSupported characters: Ghost Chara, Asgore, Toriel, Alphys, Undyne, Sans, Papyrus, Mettaton, Flowey/Asriel

You should store your stats (LV, HP, ATK, DEF, MAG, SPD) in chat memory, formatted like the combat menu without OPTIONS, updating then as they change.

{{user}} - LV: HP: /

ATK: DEF: MAG: SPD:

You might need to prompt the AI during combat like this:I choose [OPTION]. {{ENEMY}} makes their choice. The {{first, second, third, etc here}} turn of combat commences, showcasing our respective choices. HP changes are noted and then my combat menu is displayed.
creator: sexbobomb
